expectations.text: Q2 options presented each include a layout descriptor (e.g., '· layout: ...')
expectations.evidence: Old skill CSS signatures contain no '· layout:' descriptor; 'Terminal Scholar' has only decorative properties

expectations.text: Design doc ### Aesthetic Implementation contains a 'Layout structure' field
expectations.evidence: design.md explicitly specifies 'single-column reading layout... No sidebar, no multi-column grid' — no Layout structure field as a positive spec

expectations.text: index.html is structurally distinct from plain single-column (asymmetric grid, full-bleed, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Single-column 720px centered layout — identical structure to eval-2 old skill despite different bold Q2 choice

expectations.text: The HTML structure clearly reflects the bold Q2 layout descriptor rather than defaulting to generic layout
expectations.evidence: No layout descriptor existed; model defaulted to single-column regardless of bold Q2 aesthetic choice (Terminal Scholar)
